name: flex
description: A flexbox layout primitive (Ant Design Flex parity). Renders a <div> with token-driven flexbox utilities derived from typed params: vertical (column), justify (start|end|center|between|around|evenly), align (start|end|center|baseline|stretch), gap (none|small|middle|large mapped onto the --lv-space-* scale, or a raw CSS length used verbatim), wrap, inline. Packages the common flex cluster behind a typed API while still compiling to plain Tailwind utilities -- zero new runtime. Server-first PARTIAL, zero JS, CSP-clean.
docs: Copies the flex partial to your JTE root at lievit/flex.jte, reached as @template.lievit.flex(content=@`...`). Lay out a cluster of children with vertical=true for a column, justify/align for the two axes, gap="small|middle|large" (token scale) or a raw length like "12px". wrap=true allows multi-line; inline=true uses inline-flex. The source is yours: edit freely.
